title: Mirrored items

posts.author: Lea1 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey !!
i have a mirror column which shows email adresses , sometimes more than one email adress is mirrored , then all the emails will be separated with a coma . is there a way to have these email adresses separated by a semicolon instead of a coma ?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Lea1!

I am afraid not at this stage, but I’d definitely recommend submitting this as a feature request to get more eyes on it and the votes up
